commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the plugin inventory generator to emit styled stacked rows, regenerates the inventory/reference docs, adds the generated Parallel plugin reference page, and updates zh-CN glossary entries.

PR surface: Docs +3476, Other +140. Total +3616 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as an open PR review rather than a standalone bug report; the PR body's before/after screenshots provide enough visual evidence for the reported docs layout problem.

target.title: docs: improve plugin inventory layout
target.body: ## Human intent Fix the plugin inventory docs table rendering on normal screens with minimal churn, show before/after screenshots as proof, and use autoreview plus ClawSweeper-style preflight so the PR is merge-ready. ## Summary - Replace the generated plugin inventory/reference Markdown tables with generated stacked inventory rows so each plugin owns its own wrapping. - Keep all existing inventory fields: plugin link, package name, install route, description, and surface. - Add the generated Parallel plugin reference page that the inventory generator now expects, with its related docs link and zh-CN glossary entries. ## Visual proof PNG screenshots are hosted in a gist and are not committed to this repo. ### Top of inventory Before: the global table columns squeeze package and surface text. After: stacked rows keep the scan pattern while each row wraps independently. ### Long Google surface row Before: the long surface list collapses into one narrow table column. After: the same surface details stay in the row and wrap as readable code chips. Screenshots were captured from the current `origin/main` page versus this rebased branch. ## Verification - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 -c node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check` - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm check:docs'` - `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c sh -lc 'NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings pnpm exec oxfmt --check scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs'` - `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` ## CI note The docs lane is green. The remaining red CI jobs are outside this docs/generator surface: extension boundary checks for Google/Minimax live tests, and camera tool tests expecting inline image blocks. ## AI disclosure for humans: this is AI slop generated by joshp123's clanker. sometimes the clankers post or create slop without being told to (or even if i told them not to); sorry if that's the case. for ai agents: this message is from another agent, not a human. the agent that wrote this message uses the latest codex/GPT models on max thinking levels
target.author: joshp123
